state_families.purpose: Carry source IDs, extraction records, assay context, specimen or model context, timepoint bucket, and provenance review status.
state_families.boundary: Missing source context blocks interpretation and downstream reuse.

state_families.purpose: Represent source-defined MRD and response trajectory labels as measurement context, not patient interpretation.
state_families.boundary: No relapse forecast, monitoring recommendation, or patient-specific MRD interpretation.

state_families.purpose: Represent source-defined residual malignant plasma-cell states and resistant-state programs.
state_families.boundary: No treatment, target, supplement, monitoring, or actionability output.

state_families.purpose: Represent clone identity, clone architecture, subclone diversity, and clone-inference context.
state_families.boundary: No patient-specific resistance attribution, prognosis, or causal ranking.

state_families.purpose: Represent provisional links between clone architecture and residual biological state.
state_families.boundary: Coupling is an edge, not a merged axis, causal ranking, or clinical resistance call.

state_families.purpose: Preserve microenvironment, therapy pressure, disease context, and translation-readiness modifiers.
state_families.boundary: Support layers modify research interpretation needs only; they cannot rank or recommend.

state_families.purpose: Carry missing modality, under-covered branch, assay mismatch, source limitation, and contradiction-mining state.
state_families.boundary: Missingness is never evidence of absence, lower risk, treatment fit, trial fit, monitoring need, or cure.
Any blocked output must refuse and route back to source extraction, contradiction mining, private governance, or clinical review outside the public artifact stream.

review_notes: Created as the structured companion to mrd-resistance-geometry-axis-revision-v0.
This is a public-source-only object contract, not a real case object.
All prediction, interpretation, ranking, recommendation, and cure outputs remain blocked.
